the kolu atlas

The Atlas.

kolu's in-repo knowledge base — authored in markdown/MDX, rendered to self-contained HTML you can read right here in the Code tab. This index is generated from each note's frontmatter, so there is no hand-curated map to drift and nothing falls through unfiled.

design

  • The kolu Atlas

    budding proposed

    kolu's second brain — an in-repo, MDX-authored knowledge base in a self-contained Astro project, dogfooded in the Code tab.
